creator: mi@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Pietro Cerutti from comment #13)
> ===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for tcllib-1.17_1
> No file to patch.  Skipping...
> 1 out of 1 hunks ignored--saving rejects to modules/pt/pt_cparam_config_tea.tcl.rej
> => Patch patch-warnings failed to apply cleanly.

Thanks for the heads-up, but I can not reproduce it here... The file -- modules/pt/pt_cparam_config_tea.tcl -- is present in the tarball (with April 30th timestamp). Any ideas?
